summary: Tested Amp % feature additions and Per Metrics metric selector in comparison page. All major features are working correctly. Found minor legend order issue in charts.

ui_bugs.issue: Chart legend order shows 'All Stims Average, Baseline BF, Per Stim Average' but expected order is 'Per Stim Average, Baseline BF (if shown), All Stims Average'. This is due to Recharts reading legend order from data keys, not JSX order.
ui_bugs.note: Visual representation in charts is correct - lines render in proper order. Only legend text order is different.

action_items: Optional: Fix chart legend order in Per Metrics charts by reordering Line components or using Recharts legend payload prop
critical_code_review_comments: FolderComparison.js lines 509-519: hraMetricDefs correctly includes amp_norm_pct with tooltip 'Normalized Amplitude: 100 × Amplitude / Baseline BF'
FolderComparison.js lines 465-471: getAmpNorm correctly computes light_amp_norm on-the-fly if not stored in data
FolderComparison.js lines 1105-1107: HRA table header correctly shows 'Amp. %' with InfoTip tooltip
FolderComparison.js lines 1139-1142: HRA table data cells correctly compute and display Amp % values
FolderComparison.js lines 1254-1277: Metric selector buttons with data-testid and info tooltips correctly implemented
export_utils.py lines 3427-3435: PDF summary correctly includes 'Amp. (Norm.)' row with on-the-fly calculation
export_utils.py lines 4030-4089: PDF Table 4 correctly includes 'Amp. %' column
export_utils.py lines 4627-4636: Excel Summary correctly includes 'Amp. (Norm.)' row
export_utils.py lines 5133-5207: Excel Light HRA sheet correctly includes 'Amp. %' column
seed_data_creation: Used existing folder: H9 NeuCarS + Light Stimulus (ID: 69a6321397e7f87817ef235a)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Amp % feature tested and working. Key test IDs: select-hra-metric-amp_norm_pct, expand-hra-per-metric. PDF/Excel exports verified to have Amp % column and Amp. (Norm.) summary row. Minor legend order issue in charts is cosmetic only.
